narrative:
Northmont City Sd city school district has 24,976 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.8% D−R vs -6.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
